# Welcome to Cave Horror Project 2 - 1.19.2 Edition!

If you need any help or have any suggestions for future updates, please join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/QwH2ZQa)!

## ✨ Also try out our new mods - Cozy Café alongside Cozy Ingredients!
We've recently released 2 new mods that are supposed to be used together, please try them out!

**[Cozy Café - A brand new food mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozy-cafe-mod)**

**[Cozy Ingredients - A core library mod needed for Cozy Café](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozy-ingredients-mod)**

## ✨ Discover more of our projects on our website!
[![website image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64cc0402e80a62b192f8cd533228196a60a2714d.png)](https://withrage.com/)

## The Man From The Fog

As night falls, the ethereal figure known as The Man From The Fog emerges, lurking in the darkness with malevolent intent. Will you survive the night, or will you succumb to the relentless pursuit of The Man From The Fog?

![The Man From The Fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3054cf367d033ad23adcd8f8f01524f229466813.png)

## Cave Dweller

Venture into the depths of Minecraft's caverns at your own risk, as the Cave Dweller awaits in the shadows. This gruesome creature lurks within caves, ready to pounce on unsuspecting adventurers.

![Cave Dweller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/223049d0ce93be592af4834a4b619da4bfb86e35.png)

## Herobrine

Herobrine, born from the haunting realms, haunts your world with an unsettling aura. Unlike his hostile counterparts, Herobrine chooses not to always attack but to observe, sending chills down your spine as you navigate the haunted landscapes.

![Herobrine's shrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88e0fbcfa2eb3270a5a92daad7f25a9e22642ff.png)

## Spider Moth

The Spider Moth is a rare, fearsome boss that strikes only during thunderstorms, combining the speed of a spider and the menace of a moth. Beware its sudden appearance from the stormy skies!

![Spider Moth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9acbc131bfa7015f867280cd06cff436c7ac6e2d.png)

Are you ready to face the Cave Horror Project? Download the modpack today and brace yourself for a haunting journey through the twisted realms of Minecraft's darkest corners. Will you emerge unscathed, or will the abyss claim you as its own? Only the bravest adventurers will survive the nightmarish ordeal that awaits.
